summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework with MCP integration and extensive automated test generation.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test files indicates potential test maintenance burden
test suite timeout increased to 120s suggests flaky or slow integration tests
scattered test directories across multiple agent runs may lead to code duplication
suggestions: consolidate agent-generated extra tests into the main test suites to reduce duplication
investigate and optimize slow tests causing the 120s timeout increase
review MCP handler implementations for robustness and error handling
